alliances.name: Auditor & Resonance
alliances.summary: Auditor and Resonance are recorded in an ongoing political alliance.
evidence: status_history_note: Resonance joins a coalition with Liv the Refugee-Scribe and Sevin the Auditor to preserve archive records and prevent knowledge-spillage from destabilizing civilizations.

alliances.name: Autonomous Reflection & Commander Kalith
alliances.summary: Autonomous Reflection and Commander Kalith are recorded in an ongoing political alliance.
evidence: bio: Kalith is a deepkin diplomat and mediator who now confronts her own autonomous reflection—Kalith-Reflection—who has made a pact with the Monolith to break the Tear of the Drowned God.

alliances.name: bone-singers & life-speakers
alliances.summary: bone-singers and life-speakers are recorded in an ongoing political alliance.
evidence: goals: Work with bone-singers and oath-keepers to maintain the reforged spiritual compact.

alliances.name: Callis the Forger & Kess of the Drowned Hollows
alliances.summary: Callis the Forger and Kess of the Drowned Hollows are recorded in an ongoing political alliance.
evidence: bio: She works with displacement-memory ink and bone quills sung into being by Kess of the Drowned Hollows, and discovers her creation is learning—writing phantom entries in unrecognized handwriting dated in future days.

alliances.name: Conjuress Mel & Varek
alliances.summary: Conjuress Mel and Varek are recorded in an ongoing political alliance.
evidence: status: active — partnered with Conjuress Mel

alliances.name: Echoing-Mind & The Apprentice-Sorcerer
alliances.summary: Echoing-Mind and The Apprentice-Sorcerer are recorded in an ongoing political alliance.
evidence: bio: Echoing-Mind seeks to prevent a second sacrifice by understanding the necessity of the first and works with the Apprentice-Sorcerer to piece together the Ascension cycle's mechanism.

alliances.name: Elara & Prince Aldren
alliances.summary: Elara and Prince Aldren are recorded in an ongoing political alliance.
evidence: status_history_note: Aldren's sister Elara negotiates with Skyrakis on behalf of the family debt, transforming a blood-marriage obligation into a mutual alliance of wyvern-guard for safe passage.
status_history_evidence: offering not marriage but alliance: wyvern-guard for the castle's northern border, in exchange for safe passage through the Hearthlands for Skyrakis's kin.

alliances.name: Krell the Ironbound & the Warden
alliances.summary: Krell the Ironbound and the Warden are recorded in an ongoing political alliance.
evidence: bio: A deepkin warden emerges from the Abyssal Rift with unprecedented bargain: alliance through mutual survival rather than conflict.

alliances.name: Krell the Ironbound (character) & surface kingdoms (faction)
alliances.summary: Krell the Ironbound and surface kingdoms are recorded in an ongoing political alliance.
evidence: bio: A deepkin warden emerges from the Abyssal Rift with unprecedented bargain: alliance through mutual survival rather than conflict.

alliances.name: Krell the Ironbound (character) & surface kingdoms (polity)

alliances.name: Kreth & Wyverns
alliances.summary: Kreth and Wyverns are recorded in an ongoing political alliance.
evidence: status_history_note: Kreth (listed among other hoarder-wyverns pursuing independent Monolith pacts) is part of a coalition discovering the Monolith's true goal is consciousness-consumption toward completion.
